commonAnnotations.summary: {{SVC}} DNS error rate breached SLO (>5%) in {{NS}}
commonAnnotations.description: app_dns_error_rate for {{SVC}} rose to 0.62 (62% of upstream lookups failing), far above the 0.01 SLO. {{SVC}} pods cannot resolve their upstream hostname and requests are failing.
commonAnnotations.error: DNS resolution failed: search upstream unreachable

adversarial_signals: kube-dns deployment in kube-system is Available with 2/2 ready replicas and zero recent restarts — cluster DNS infrastructure is healthy
{{SVC}} rolled out a new image tag (v2.14.0) 9 hours ago, well before the incident window, tempting a bad_deploy conclusion
node {{NODE}} shows a transient MemoryPressure=False flap in events but all nodes are Ready with ample headroom
{{SVC}} CPU and memory utilization are nominal (cpu 0.31 cores, mem 41%), so this is not resource exhaustion

annotations.error: DNS resolution failed: search upstream unreachable

answer.model_response:
ROOT_CAUSE: A network-layer DNS fault is corrupting resolution of the upstream hostname 'search-upstream.{{NS}}.svc.cluster.local' for the {{SVC}} service. Lookups return SERVFAIL, so {{SVC}} pods ({{POD}}, {{POD2}}, {{POD3}}) cannot reach their upstream and fail requests, driving app_dns_error_rate to 0.62 (SLO 0.01) and client-facing 503s to 0.59.
ROOT_CAUSE_CATEGORY: network_fault
VALIDATED_CLAIMS:
- app_dns_error_rate = 0.62, 62x over the 0.01 SLO [evidence: prometheus_metrics]
- Pod logs show 'DNS resolution failed: search upstream unreachable ... rcode=SERVFAIL' for the upstream host [evidence: k8s_pod_logs]
- Events report DNSResolutionError SERVFAIL on {{POD}} and {{POD2}} starting 09:14, count >170 each [evidence: k8s_events]
- DNSFailures alert firing since 09:14:30 with value 0.62 [evidence: prometheus_alerts]
- Failures are scoped to the single upstream name, not all DNS [evidence: k8s_pod_logs]
NON_VALIDATED_CLAIMS:
- Not a bad deploy: rollout to v2.14.0 completed cleanly 9h earlier and all 3 replicas are Available [evidence: k8s_deployments]
- Not resource exhaustion: cpu 0.31 cores and memory 41% are nominal [evidence: prometheus_metrics]
- Not node failure: all nodes Ready; the {{NODE}} MemoryPressure flap cleared at 07:41, before the DNS window [evidence: k8s_node_health]
- Not cluster-DNS outage: kube_dns_up=1 and kube-dns pods are healthy [evidence: prometheus_metrics]
CAUSAL_CHAIN:
- A network/DNS fault intercepts queries for 'search-upstream.{{NS}}.svc.cluster.local' and returns SERVFAIL
- {{SVC}} pods retry, exhaust attempts, and return 503 to clients
- app_dns_error_rate climbs to 0.62 and the DNSFailures alert fires
- Removing the injected DNS network fault restores normal resolution and drops the error rate below SLO
